gravesown.configuration.title: Gravesown Configuration
gravesown.configuration.world.tooltip: Controls how Gravesown replaces the vanilla ecosystem.
gravesown.configuration.removeExistingVa: Prevents ordinary vanilla mobs loaded from saved chunks from re-entering the world.
gravesown.configuration.replaceNaturalVa: Replaces eligible Overworld animal spawns and suppresses other ordinary natural vanilla spawns.
gravesown.configuration.preserveVanillaB: Keeps the Ender Dragon and Wither until progression-safe Gravesown replacements exist.
